sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n21070" key="broxeto/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">βροχετός</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, (<etym lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="etym">βρέχω</etym>) <sense id="n21070.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">wetting, rain,</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">AP</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">6.21.3</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
